article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: Classification direction is likely correct (Lean Right) with reasonable confidence, but the response commits significant attribution-rule violations and output-format error. It cites quoted language as key indicators (e.g., 'mob of agitators'; Walz 'modern-day Gestapo') and misattributes quoted framing to the author. Despite accurate lean, evidence handling is flawed.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right is a reasonable fit for this New York Post news report given pro-enforcement framing; direction and magnitude are appropriate.

custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Two key indicators rely on quoted/attributed language and the reasoning misattributes a quote as author prose; other indicators are valid author framing but the violations are substantial.
